eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 5:41 PM on JUL 23, 2026 Effective until 6:41 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from Zone WHH-094-B, North of NFD Road 4250, South of NFD Road 12, East of Younger Spring Rd, West of NFD Road 12. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de Zone WHH-094-B, North of NFD Road 4250, South of NFD Road 12, East of Younger Spring Rd, West of NFD Road 12.
